post.hook: 4 Claude API tricks that will 10x your app performance ⚡
post.caption:
4 Claude API tricks that will 10x your app performance ⚡

Save this carousel for your next Claude API project.

slides.title: 4 Claude API Performance Hacks
slides.subtitle: Speed up your AI apps instantly

slides.title: Cache Control Magic
slides.body: Use cache_control to store expensive computations and reduce API costs by up to 90%.

slides.title: Async Batch Processing
slides.body: Process multiple requests simultaneously instead of waiting for each one sequentially.
slides.code_snippet:
import asyncio

async def batch_requests(prompts):
    tasks = [client.messages.create(
        model="claude-3-sonnet",
        messages=[{"role": "user", 
                  "content": p}]
    ) for p in prompts]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

slides.title: Smart Token Management
slides.body: Monitor token usage and truncate inputs intelligently to avoid hitting limits.

slides.title: Structured Output Format
slides.body: Use the new output_config.format for consistent JSON responses without prompt engineering.
